reasoning: A high-contrast, athletic aesthetic fitting a modern sports club. Uses deep navy/indigo as the dark anchor, with electric sky blue and pure white to create visual tension and highlight key interactions. This aligns with 2026 sports UI trends of dark mode dominance, bold typography, and action-oriented layouts.

headings.rationale: High-impact, wide geometric sans that commands attention. Conveys athletic authority.

body.rationale: Highly legible, modern sans-serif with a slightly technical feel that pairs well with wide display fonts.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing + Bento Grids. Let the high-contrast elements breathe.

navbar.classes: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#060B14]/80 border-b border-white/10
navbar.interaction: Bilingual toggle (EU/ES) prominent on the right next to Contact CTA.

hero.layout: Full viewport height (min-h-[80vh]), content center-left aligned.
hero.background: Dark overlay (bg-black/60) over the action-shot hero image to ensure text pops.
hero.typography: Massive H1 in Clash Display with a Sky Blue accent word.
hero.cta: Primary button in Sky Blue, Secondary button transparent with white border.

team_cards.style: Neumorphic/Tactile variant adapted for Dark Theme
team_cards.classes: bg-[#0C1527] rounded-xl border border-white/10 overflow-hidden group hover:border-[#38BDF8]/50 transition-colors
team_cards.image_behavior: Image scales up (scale-105) on group hover
team_cards.content: p-6. Title in Clash Display, subtitle/category in Manrope.

contact_form.wrapper: bg-[#0C1527] p-8 md:p-12 rounded-2xl border border-white/10
contact_form.inputs: bg-[#060B14] border-white/10 text-white focus:border-[#38BDF8] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#38BDF8] rounded-lg
contact_form.button: w-full bg-[#38BDF8] hover:bg-[#0284C7] text-[#060B14] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider py-4 rounded-lg transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1

admin_dashboard.cards: Flat solid surfaces (#0C1527), 1px subtle border, sharp corners (rounded-md max).
admin_dashboard.tables: Shadcn UI tables customized for dark mode. Sky blue used strictly for primary actions.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons translate-y-[-2px] with increased shadow. Card borders transition from white/10 to sky-400/50.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade and slight slide-up (using Framer Motion).

hero_background.description: Soccer ball on field empty stadium
hero_background.usage: Hero section background with dark overlay

teams_section.usage: Team categories preview or header for 'Equipos' page

about_section.usage: Quiénes somos (About us) background or inline image to anchor the local identity

extra_action.description: Young kids playing soccer on field

instructions_to_main_agent: Must implement a bilingual toggle (Euskera / Castellano). Use a React context or i18n library to manage state across 'Inicio', 'Quiénes somos', 'Equipos/Categorías', and 'Contacto'.
Apply 'Clash Display' font for all headings. Ensure it is loaded either locally or via a CDN (e.g., Fontshare). Use 'Manrope' (Google Fonts) for body text.
Install and use Phosphor Icons (yarn add @phosphor-icons/react) for UI icons (sporty, crisp).
Implement the Contact form securely, configured to send emails via Resend as requested.
The admin panel must be built using Shadcn UI. Keep it strictly functional: dense data tables, clear primary actions in Sky Blue.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, form inputs, language toggles, nav links) for automated testing. Example: data-testid='nav-about-link'.
Hero image must have a bg-black/60 overlay to ensure text contrast (APCA standards).
Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings under any circumstances.
Use standard raw HTML+Tailwind for public marketing pages (Home, About). Shadcn is reserved for interactive forms and the entire Admin dashboard.
The project uses .js files (not .tsx). Adjust component syntax and Shadcn implementations accordingly.
